tips: Use fenced code blocks with language tags for syntax highlighting
Separate sections with H2 (##) rather than H1 for better document structure
Use tables for structured data with alignment markers
Add a table of contents at the top of long documents
Use blockquotes (> ) for important callouts and warnings
Use task lists (- [ ]) for tracking progress in documentation
Embed MermaidJS diagrams for architecture and flow visualization
Use definition lists for glossaries and key-value descriptions
Keep lines under 80 characters for better readability in diff views
Use reference-style links to keep document text clean and readable
Add alt text to all images for accessibility
Use <!-- comments --> for internal notes that shouldn't render
